entry.title: Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth Theorem
entry.content:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js" async></script> <script> MathJax = { tex: { inlineMath: [['\\(', '\\)']], displayMath: [['$$', '$$']], macros: { Z: '\\mathbb{Z}', Q: '\\mathbb{Q}', F: '\\mathbb{F}', Hom: '\\mathrm{Hom}', Tor: '\\mathrm{Tor}', Ext: '\\mathrm{Ext}', im: '\\mathrm{im}', coker: '\\mathrm{coker}', pd: '\\mathrm{pd}', Ab: '\\mathbf{Ab}' } } }; </script>
# Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth Theorem
We work first in \( \Ab = \Z \)-Mod. The target is the Künneth exact sequence
\[ 0 \to H(C)\otimes H(D) \to H(C\otimes D) \to \Tor_1^{\Z}(H(C),H(D)) \to 0 \]
**Paste the full proof from your .tex file below this line.**
(Use $$ for display math. The macros above should make \Tor, \Z, \Ab, etc. work.)

entry.title: Heller's Simple Proof of the Künneth Theorem
entry.content:
Heller’s Simple Proof of the Künneth Theorem

The full proof with all sections, theorems, proofs, examples, and diagrams is available as a PDF:

📄 Download Full Proof (PDF)

This avoids raw LaTeX rendering issues. The PDF contains the complete document exactly as you wrote it in the .tex file.
